nodes.name: Schedule Trigger
nodes.notes: Cron heartbeat — fires every 4 hours. Adjust the interval to match how often you want Maya to sweep Supabase for pending follow-ups.

nodes.name: Supabase: Get Pending Voice Follow-Ups
nodes.notes: Reads leads where status='Pending' from Supabase via PostgREST. Adjust SUPABASE_LEADS_TABLE in .env if your table isn't named `leads`. Update the column filter if your status column has a different name.

nodes.name: Loop One Lead at a Time
nodes.notes: Process leads serially so we don't hammer Retell or Supabase. After the call is dispatched the loop continues with the next lead.

nodes.name: Summarize Prior Conversation
nodes.notes: Compresses the full thread into a concise brief that fits inside the Retell dynamic variable. Model is gpt-4o-mini for cost; bump to gpt-4o if you want higher fidelity.

nodes.name: Prepare Retell Variables
nodes.notes: Extracts the summary text from OpenAI's response and re-attaches the lead row so the next node has both.

nodes.name: Retell: Create Phone Call
nodes.notes: Dispatches the outbound follow-up call. The previous_conversation_summary is injected as a dynamic variable referenced by {{previous_conversation_summary}} in the Maya prompt. Adjust lead.phone / lead.first_name / lead.company_name expressions if your leads table uses different column names.

nodes.name: Mark Queue Sent
nodes.notes: Flips the lead status from 'Pending' to 'Called' so the next schedule tick doesn't re-dial the same person. Drop or rename the last_called_at field if you don't have that column.

main.node: Loop One Lead at a Time
Loop One Lead at a Time

call.transcript:
Agent: Hey, this is Maya calling from Flowtics AI! Hope I'm not catching you at a bad time. did I get the right person?
User: Absolutely. I'm the one you are on the right time. 
Agent: Great, thanks for confirming! Just to make sure—am I speaking with you from your company?
User: This is from Scala. 
Agent: Thanks for confirming! What kind of business is Scala—are you running an agency, or is it another type of business?
User: It's an agency which helping other agency, other business with more bookings, more leads, more closing. 
Agent: Got it, so you’re helping other agencies and businesses get more bookings, leads, and closed deals. How big is your team right now?
User: We are fifteen people running this business for almost three years. 
User: And I'm interested with your service. And currently, I'm facing problem like getting stuck with getting more leads and more bookings. So I think can help me with that. There's a reason I am reaching to you. 
Agent: That's really helpful—honestly, based on everything you've shared, I think Flowtics AI could be a strong fit for what you're trying to do. I'm sending a booking link to your 
User: Yes. 
Agent: phone right now—it only takes about 30 seconds to grab a slot.
User: I I I I got I've got a link, and I just put and it says that I'm I'm confirmed this appointment. So it seems like everything alright. 
Agent: Amazing—you're all booked in! The Flowtics AI team will call you right at that time, and you'll also get a confirmation message on your phone. Really appreciate your time today—looking forward to seeing you on the calendar!

call_analysis.call_summary: The agent spoke with a representative from Scala, an agency helping other businesses with bookings and leads. The user expressed interest in Flowtics AI's services to address their lead generation challenges and successfully booked a follow-up appointment via a provided link. The call concluded with confirmation of the booking and appreciation from the agent.

- **Objections/Concerns**: None noted in the conversation history
- **Commitments/Next Steps**: Agreed to schedule a demo on Thursday
- **Last Channel and Recency of Contact**: Last contact was via voice on May 13, 2026
